api: Chatwoot Application API v1 (Platform + Application APIs; account-scoped /api/v1/accounts/{account_id}/...)
scope: Greenfield build: the core support-desk read surface (conversations, contacts, inboxes, agents, teams, labels, conversation-scoped messages) plus the documented mutation set the task specifies (contact create/update, conversation create, message send, conversation status toggle, label create). The remainder of Chatwoot's Application/Platform API (canned responses, automation rules, custom attribute definitions, custom filters, webhooks, integrations, help-center portals, agent bots, teams membership management, reporting/analytics v2 endpoints, account_users platform API) is out of scope for this build.
